channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Wreckage of Pan Am plane found in ocean 74 years after deadly crash
item.description: The 1952 crash killed 52 people and led to mandatory passenger safety briefings on commercial flights.

item.title: Nolan Wells' family to announce independent autopsy findings
item.description: The preliminary results of an independent autopsy on Mississippi teenager Nolan Wells will be released Wednesday as the death investigation continues.

item.title: WATCH: Dad recreates most daring videos on the internet
item.description: ABC News' Danny New speaks with an Atlanta father who risks his body to replicate viral physical challenges.

item.title: Can a democratic socialist win governor's race in battleground Wisconsin?
item.description: Democratic socialists believe their movement could claim another victory in an unexpected place: the swing state of Wisconsin.
